meta.title: Dashboard - Ozoxy Partner Portal
meta.description: Status-aware operating surface for onboarding, review, inbox, cases, and readiness gating.

title: OZOXY PARTNER PORTAL
subtitle: PP2 turns the shell into a state-aware applicant workspace: review requests, inbox events, limited-access modules, and explainable blocked states now move together.

scenario.label: Local review scenario
scenario.description: Until backend review APIs arrive, this simulator drives the current workspace status, menu visibility, inbox content, and applicant-safe surface behavior.
scenario.helper: Use it to validate draft, needs-info, review, waitlist, probation, active, and restricted behavior in one portal shell.

role.label: Workspace role simulator
role.description: PP3 adds role-aware gating. Switch the current workspace role to verify menu access, section access, and route behavior for the launch role set.
role.helper: The selected role updates the sidebar, direct route access, and the new team/programs/legal surfaces.

releaseRing.label: Portal release ring
releaseRing.description: PP7 adds rollout gating. Switch the current release band to verify that modules stay closed until the intended launch ring opens.
releaseRing.helper: Use R1 for applicant and probation-safe launch, R2 for Creator / Affiliate launch, R3 for Performance rollout, and R4 for Reseller / API rollout.

workspaceStatus.title: WORKSPACE STATUS
workspaceStatus.description: Home, menu visibility, and direct-route posture all follow the same workspace band.

pendingTasks.title: PENDING TASKS
pendingTasks.description: Requested info and readiness blockers are now surfaced as first-class partner tasks.

notifications.title: INBOX SIGNALS
notifications.description: Unread portal notifications expose the latest ops, review, and governance signals.

cases.title: OPEN CASES
cases.description: Support and review threads stay visible even before operational launch.

tasks.title: Pending tasks
tasks.description: Applicant-facing work is now explicit: requested info, finance onboarding, and blocked-state explanations live here.

readiness.title: Readiness overlays
readiness.description: Finance, compliance, technical posture, and governance state are kept separate from the canonical workspace status.

sections.title: Visible sections
sections.description: The sidebar and direct routes now follow the same visibility matrix.

rollout.title: Rollout readiness
rollout.description: Release-ring gating prevents modules from leaking ahead of the intended launch band.
rollout.empty: No additional modules are being held back by the current release ring.

performanceSnapshot.title: Performance Snapshot
performanceSnapshot.description: PP5 pulls core reporting signals onto the dashboard so analytics and export posture become visible before deeper conversion surfaces land.

financeSnapshot.title: Finance Snapshot
financeSnapshot.description: Finance readiness, reserves, and payout forecast now have a dedicated dashboard summary instead of hiding behind later settlement screens.

nextActions.title: Next actions
nextActions.description: Use the applicant-safe surfaces to continue the review loop: update the application, respond to partner ops, and inspect inbox changes.
